nodes.label: kalkulator-kalkmate-platforma-pcb-elektronika.png
nodes.description: Marketing/branding photograph (not an actual PCB view despite the filename). Close-up of a black Esperanza 'ELECTRONIC CALCULATOR' device with the KalkMate brand name displayed on a segmented/dot-matrix-style LCD/OLED display. Visible keypad buttons in the lower portion include MU, %, divide, square root, M+, MR, and digit 9, characteristic of a consumer calculator interface. The image represents the KalkMate product/platform identity rather than exposing PCB traces or electronic components.
visible_elements: Keypad buttons: MU, %, divide, square root, M+, MR, 9

edges.rationale: The dot-matrix/segmented 'KalkMate' text rendered on the device display visually corresponds to the SSD1322 256x64 OLED display planned in the KalkMate hardware spec.
Visible membrane-style keypad buttons (digits and function keys) correspond to the 5x5 keypad matrix driven by MCP23017 described in CLAUDE.md.
Image displays KalkMate branding on the device screen, representing the overall product identity of the AI-assisted educational calculator.

summary: Image is a KalkMate product branding photo showing 'KalkMate' on a calculator display with a visible keypad, semantically tied to the OLED display, 5x5 keypad matrix, and overall product concept.
